title: urostelma chinense
intro: Urostelma chinense is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant, also known as Cistanthe chinensis or Urostelma chinense, belonging to the family Portulacaceae. It is commonly used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive problems such as diarrhea and constipation. Urostelma chinense can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
